description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, black touchscreen display with a thin bezel and a small cutout at the top for a front-facing camera and possibly a speaker. The back is a smooth, dark surface with two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of a matte or lightly textured material, with visible buttons for volume and power on the left and right edges. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The device is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist design with slim side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large black touchscreen with a small cutout at the top for the front camera.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying slim profile and elongated side buttons, likely for volume control.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a smooth dark surface with two vertically aligned camera lenses and a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing a slim profile with a single button, likely the power button.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back; a single front-facing camera is centered above the screen.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible: two elongated buttons on the left edge (likely volume up/down) and one button on the right edge (likely the power button).
